privateBrunch.title: Private Brunch
privateBrunch.body: Reserve the full venue or patio exclusively for your group. Birthday brunches, baby showers, corporate team events, and milestone celebrations — Louisiana Purchase handles the food, the drinks, and the atmosphere.
privateBrunch.imageAlt: Fried chicken and waffles brunch spread at a private event at Louisiana Purchase North Park

seo.title: Weekend Brunch in North Park San Diego | Louisiana Purchase
seo.description: Weekend brunch at Louisiana Purchase — North Park's most indulgent Saturday and Sunday ritual. Creole brunch plates, craft cocktails, and an open patio from 12 PM. Reserve your table.
seo.schemaDescription: Weekend brunch at Louisiana Purchase in North Park, San Diego. Creole brunch plates, craft cocktails, and an open patio every Saturday and Sunday from 12 PM to 3 PM.

value.title: Weekend Brunch
value.subtitle: North Park's most indulgent weekend ritual. Creole brunch plates, craft cocktails, and an open patio from noon. Come hungry. Stay for the afternoon.
value.imageAlt: Drop Top Chicken Flock, Catfish N' Grits, and Shrimp N' Grits at Louisiana Purchase brunch
Brunch at Louisiana Purchase North Park San Diego
value.title: Not Just Brunch.
body: Louisiana Purchase brunch isn't a quick eggs-and-toast affair. It's a full New Orleans-inspired afternoon — Creole plates built for lingering, craft cocktails poured with the same care as dinner service, and a patio that makes San Diego feel like the French Quarter.
Every Saturday and Sunday from noon. The kind of brunch you plan your weekend around.

value.title: Creole Brunch
value.subtitle: Chef Quinnton Austin's weekend brunch program — elevated Creole plates and craft cocktails built for a long, indulgent afternoon.

value.imageAlt: Family enjoying weekend brunch at Louisiana Purchase North Park San Diego
value.title: North Park's
body: Louisiana Purchase sits at the corner of University Ave and 23rd St in the heart of North Park — San Diego's most vibrant dining neighborhood. On weekends, the patio fills early and the bar program runs at full power from the moment doors open.
Walk-ins are welcome but tables go fast. Reserve ahead for guaranteed seating on the patio or at the bar.

value.title: Brunch FAQ
value.subtitle: Everything you need to know about weekend brunch at Louisiana Purchase in North Park, San Diego.

value.title: Brunch at Louisiana Purchase.
